title: Smoke and Mirrors: The Story of Tom Savini
original_title: Smoke and Mirrors: The Story of Tom Savini
overview: Tom Savini is one of the greatest special effects legends in the history of cinema, but little is known about his personal life until now. For the first time ever a feature length film has covered not only Tom's amazing career spanning over four decades, but his personal life as well.
